name: Xiangcai Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiangcai Co., Ltd. engages in soybean deep processing, biochemical, real estate development, and new energy businesses in China and internationally. It offers protein isolates, tissue proteins, soy fibers, and soybean protein powders; and pharmaceuticals, including injections, tablets, capsules, granules, ointments, sprays, and other formulations of approximately 100 kinds of products for the treatment of anti-tumor, anti-burn, anti-cardiovascular, and cerebrovascular diseases. The company also engages in the solid preparation, liquid preparation, and genetic engineering activities. In addition, it provides waterproof materials, which are used in housing and mine construction, high-speed rail construction, hydropower stations and large-scale waste disposal site construction, and other waterproofing works; and develops solar power products. The company was formerly known as Harbin High-Tech (Group) Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Xiangcai Co., Ltd. in September 2020. Xiangcai Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Harbin, China.
